**Issue 1 ŌĆö Architecture violation (AD6)**  
`WorkItem` and `EngineError` were defined in `workflow-compiler.ts` but imported by `workflow-types.ts`, inverting the intended dependency direction. Fixed by moving the interface definitions to `workflow-types.ts` (the base layer) and adding `export type { WorkItem, EngineError } from './workflow-types.js'` in `workflow-compiler.ts` as a re-export. All existing import paths continue to resolve unchanged.

**Issue 2 ŌĆö Missing verification artifacts**  
Created `verification/21-3-extract-workflow-machines-proof.md` with real evidence for all 13 ACs (build output, test counts, line counts, grep checks).

**Issue 3 ŌĆö Stale AGENTS.md**  
Updated `src/lib/AGENTS.md` to add `workflow-machines.ts` entry and update both `workflow-types.ts` and `workflow-machine.ts` descriptions to reflect post-extraction state.

Also created `docs/exec-plans/active/21-3-extract-workflow-machines.md` per documentation requirements.

**Verification:** Build exits 0, 4977 tests pass (0 failures), all AC structural checks green.
